caption: A blonde woman wearing a black t-shirt and a thin head-worn microphone is speaking against a textured purple backdrop. Her shirt features the white text "WHO'S IN YOUR", though the remaining words are obscured. She begins by looking slightly to her right with a neutral expression. As time progresses, she turns her head further to the right and begins to smile. She then rotates her head back toward the center, maintaining a soft smile and looking toward someone off-screen to her left. In the final sequence, she holds this position, looking forward and slightly left with a pleasant, attentive expression. Her ponytail remains still throughout the movements. A small portion of another person's grey sleeve is visible on the far right edge of the scene.
